description: Load test-only persistence routines and append prefix-unique parser aliases after every production module

replacements.new:
<INSERT-FILE "ritual_resonance" T>
<INSERT-FILE "persistence_test" T>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-TROLL-READY-LIT ()
	<MOVE ,LAMP ,WINNER>
	<FSET ,LAMP ,ONBIT>
	<V-PERSIST-TROLL-READY>
	<SETG CLOCK-WAIT T>
	<RTRUE>>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-BROKEN-EGG-READY ()
	<PERSIST-QUIET-THIEF>
	<SETG GLULX-ALT-NEST-BURNED <>>
	<SETG GLULX-ALT-EGG-CAUGHT <>>
	<SETG GLULX-ALT-SACK-PREPARED <>>
	<MOVE ,SANDWICH-BAG ,WINNER>
	<FSET ,SANDWICH-BAG ,OPENBIT>
	<MOVE ,TORCH ,WINNER>
	<FSET ,TORCH ,ONBIT>
	<FSET ,TORCH ,FLAMEBIT>
	<REMOVE-CAREFULLY ,BROKEN-EGG>
	<MOVE ,NEST ,UP-A-TREE>
	<MOVE ,EGG ,NEST>
	<MOVE ,CANARY ,EGG>
	<GOTO ,PATH>
	<TELL "PERSIST-SETUP:BROKEN-EGG-READY" CR>>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-BROKEN-EGG-REPORT ()
	<COND (<AND ,GLULX-ALT-NEST-BURNED
	            <NOT ,GLULX-ALT-EGG-CAUGHT>
	            <IN? ,BROKEN-EGG ,PATH>
	            <IN? ,BROKEN-CANARY ,BROKEN-EGG>
	            <NOT <LOC ,EGG>>>
	       <TELL "PERSIST:EGG=BROKEN-WITH-BROKEN-CANARY" CR>)
	      (T
	       <TELL "PERSIST:BROKEN-EGG=OTHER" CR>)>>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-BROKEN-EGG-MUTATE ()
	<SETG GLULX-ALT-NEST-BURNED <>>
	<SETG GLULX-ALT-EGG-CAUGHT <>>
	<SETG GLULX-ALT-SACK-PREPARED <>>
	<REMOVE-CAREFULLY ,BROKEN-EGG>
	<MOVE ,NEST ,UP-A-TREE>
	<MOVE ,EGG ,NEST>
	<MOVE ,CANARY ,EGG>
	<MOVE ,SANDWICH-BAG ,WINNER>
	<TELL "PERSIST-MUTATED:BROKEN-EGG" CR>>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-LEAK-REPORT-CANONICAL ()
	<COND (<L? ,WATER-LEVEL 0>
	       <TELL "PERSIST:LEAK=SEALED" CR>)
	      (<G? ,WATER-LEVEL 0>
	       <TELL "PERSIST:LEAK=ACTIVE-AND-RISING" CR>)
	      (T
	       <TELL "PERSIST:LEAK=ACTIVE" CR>)>>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-LEAK-MUTATE-SEALED ()
	<V-PERSIST-LEAK-MUTATE>
	<SETG WATER-LEVEL -1>
	<RTRUE>>
<SYNTAX PTREADY = V-PERSIST-TROLL-READY-LIT>
<SYNTAX PTREPORT = V-PERSIST-TROLL-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PTMUTATE = V-PERSIST-TROLL-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PEREADY = V-PERSIST-EGG-READY>
<SYNTAX PEREPORT = V-PERSIST-EGG-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PEMUTATE = V-PERSIST-EGG-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PBREADY = V-PERSIST-BROKEN-EGG-READY>
<SYNTAX PBREPORT = V-PERSIST-BROKEN-EGG-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PBMUTATE = V-PERSIST-BROKEN-EGG-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PDREADY = V-PERSIST-DAM-READY>
<SYNTAX PDTOP = V-PERSIST-DAM-TOP>
<SYNTAX PDREPORT = V-PERSIST-DAM-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PDMUTATE = V-PERSIST-DAM-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PDTIMER = V-PERSIST-DAM-TIMER>
<SYNTAX PLREADY = V-PERSIST-LEAK-READY>
<SYNTAX PLREPORT = V-PERSIST-LEAK-REPORT-CANONICAL>
<SYNTAX PLMUTATE = V-PERSIST-LEAK-MUTATE-SEALED>
<SYNTAX PRREADY = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-READY>
<SYNTAX PRREPORT = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PRMUTATE = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PRTIMER = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-TIMER>
